name: Operation MBBS
overview: Operation MBBS chronicles the lives of three first year students - Huma, Sakshi and Nishant in one of the best MBBS colleges in the country. Follow their journey as they navigate through friendships, hardships and medical student life.

trailers.title: Dice Media | Operation MBBS | Season 2 | Web Series | Official Trailer | Episode 1 out on 15th March
Dice Media | Operation MBBS | Web Series | Official Trailer | Releasing on 22 February, 2020
